sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, example_string VARCHAR(255));
UPDATE test_strings SET example_string = right(example_string, 4) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT right(example_string, 3) AS last_three_chars FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, right(example_string, 2) AS last_two_chars FROM test_strings;
